input.mission_scope: Monitor Douyin policy shifts for local healthcare merchants
raw_signals: Official creator notice tightens medical efficacy claims

cases.label: edge_case

input.mission_scope: Detect channel opportunities for local education
raw_signals: Anonymous forum rumor with no source
Small creator claims secret traffic loophole
Official announcement for new local service ad format

mustInclude: low reliability rumor should be filtered
official ad format should be surfaced

cases.label: happy_path

raw_signals: Competitor X launched free measurement campaign
Competitor Y increased case-study posting frequency
No official platform rule changes detected

mustInclude: competitive move categorized separately from platform rule

cases.label: failure_case

input.mission_scope: Rapid trend scan for wedding photography
raw_signals: Three duplicate reposted claims from unknown aggregator sites
